members.headline: GBT model trained on ads from a successful business generating over $25M revenue

You cannot ask your team to do what you won't do
Process must always go above the player; no one is above the process

Going pro is a binary decision, not a gradual shift

The escape route (father's rescue) comes with permanent cost

Longer time horizon wins; start with getting to $1M revenue, then expand vision as resources grow.
